description_long: This storage box is a robust, rectangular container constructed primarily from wooden planks, framed by a thicker wooden border. The planks are arranged horizontally on the sides and vertically on the top, with visible wood grain and small knots, giving it a rustic, utilitarian appearance. The box is solid and sturdy, with no visible openings, handles, or decorative elements, suggesting it is designed for durability and secure storage. The top surface is flat and reinforced, making it suitable for stacking or supporting other objects. The wood is untreated or lightly finished, maintaining a natural, matte look. There are no visible hinges, locks, or signage, indicating a simple, functional design for general storage purposes.
description: A sturdy, rectangular wooden storage box with a flat, reinforced top and natural wood finish. It features horizontal planks on the sides and a thick frame, with no visible handles or locks.
description_view_0: Front view shows the horizontal wooden planks framed by a thick wooden border, with a flat, plank-covered top.
description_view_1: Side view is nearly identical to the front, displaying the same horizontal planks and thick frame, with subtle wood grain variations.
description_view_2: Back view mirrors the front and side, with consistent plank arrangement and frame thickness.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the same horizontal planks and sturdy frame, maintaining uniformity across all sides.
